name.type.description: The content type of the Kling video to generate, such as 'Link', 'Text', etc.

name.modeStd.description: The standard mode of Kling video

name.modePro.description: The high-quality mode of Kling video

name.mode4k.description: Kling 4K mode (supported only by v3 / v3-Omni)

name.cameraControl.description: The camera control type and parameters

name.cameraTypeDownBack.description: Preset camera move: down and back

name.cameraTypeForwardUp.description: Preset camera move: forward and up

name.cameraTypeLeftTurnForward.description: Preset camera move: left turn and forward

name.cameraTypeRightTurnForward.description: Preset camera move: right turn and forward

name.failure.description: The failure state of the task

name.traceId.description: The trace ID of the task

name.createdAt.description: The date and time the Kling video was generated

name.cfgScale.description: The freedom level parameter for generating the video (0-1), the higher the value, the closer to the reference

name.generateAudio.description: Whether to generate audio sync, supported by kling-v3, kling-v3-omni, and kling-v2-6 (pro mode)

name.startImage.description: Field label for the first frame reference image (suggested English translation: 'First Frame', to keep it short and prevent button overlap)

name.negativePrompt.description: Negative text prompt for generating the video

name.endImage.description: Field label for the last frame reference image (suggested English translation: 'Last Frame', to keep it short and prevent button overlap)

name.ingredients.description: Switch/label for creating video with multiple images (suggested English translation: 'Multi-Image', keep it short)

name.model.description: The model version used for generating the video

name.ratio.description: The aspect ratio for the video generation

name.mode.description: The mode used for generating the video

name.effect.description: The name of the style parameter, used to switch between different versions or styles of the model

name.ingredientsModel.description: The model version used for generating the video

name.klingBot.description: The name of the Kling video generator

description.ingredients.message: Enable this button if you want to upload multiple images to create your video.

description.imageUrl.message: Multiple images must be uploaded in multi-image video tasks.

description.negativePrompt.message: Negative text prompt, optional, cannot exceed 200 characters

description.uploadStartImage.message: Upload the first frame image as a reference for generation, the final video will reference the first frame
description.uploadStartImage.description: Description for the reference upload parameter

description.uploadEndImage.message: Upload the last frame as a reference; the final video will be generated based on it

description.cfgScale.message: Freedom of video generation, range [0,1]. The larger the value, the stronger the correlation.
description.cfgScale.description: Description of the parameter for uploading references

description.mode.message: std offers better performance, pro provides better image quality; 4K is only supported by v3 / v3-Omni, and cannot be used with camera control.
description.mode.description: Overall description of the mode field

description.mode4kRequiresV3.description: Reason why 4K option is disabled (model mismatch)

description.mode4kIncompatibleCamera.message: Camera control is enabled and cannot be used with 4K.
description.mode4kIncompatibleCamera.description: Reason why 4K option is disabled (camera control enabled)

description.duration.message: Normal models only support 5/10 seconds; v3 / v3-Omni supports 3/5/8/10/12/15 seconds.
description.duration.description: Overall description of the duration field

description.durationV3Only.description: Reason why the duration option is disabled

description.generateAudio.message: Generate sound effects while generating video. Only kling-v3 / kling-v3-omni / kling-v2-6 (pro mode) support this.

description.generateAudioUnsupported.message: The current model does not support synced sound effects. Only kling-v3 / kling-v3-omni / kling-v2-6 (pro mode) are available.

description.cameraControl.message: Control the direction of camera movement. Select 'Custom' to fine-tune along 6 dimensions, with values between [-1, 1].

description.cameraControlDisabled4k.message: 4K mode is selected, camera control is unavailable. Please switch to std / pro mode before enabling.
description.cameraControlDisabled4k.description: Reason why camera control is disabled

status.pending.description: Status indicating the task is waiting

status.processing.description: Status indicating the task is being processed

placeholder.paddingNoise.description: Placeholder text for padding noise input

placeholder.paddingLevel.description: Placeholder text for padding level input

placeholder.prompt.message: Enter a prompt for the video style, e.g., moving
placeholder.prompt.description: Placeholder text for the prompt field

placeholder.negativePrompt.message: Enter negative prompts for the video style, up to 200 characters
placeholder.negativePrompt.description: Placeholder text for the negative prompt field

placeholder.aspectRatio.description: Placeholder text for aspect ratio input

placeholder.cameraType.description: Placeholder text for camera type selection

placeholder.markerShape.description: Placeholder text for marker shape input

button.precise.description: Button text to generate Kling video with precise settings

button.creative.description: Button text to generate Kling video with creative settings

button.generate.description: Button text to generate Kling video

button.extend.description: Button text to extend a video

button.download.description: Button text to download the video

button.uploadImageUrl.description: Button text to upload an image (simplified to 'Upload', no 'Upload Image')

button.uploadVideoUrl.description: Button text to upload a video

message.uploadReferencesExceed.message: You can upload a maximum of 1 image
message.uploadReferencesExceed.description: Error message when the uploaded image exceeds the limit

message.uploadReferencesSuccess.description: Success message after successfully uploading an image

message.uploadReferencesError.message: Image upload failed, please try again later
message.uploadReferencesError.description: Error message when image upload fails

message.startingTask.description: Message when a drawing task is starting

message.startTaskSuccess.description: Success message when the task starts

message.startTaskFailed.message: Failed to start task, please contact the administrator
message.startTaskFailed.description: Error message when the drawing task fails to start

message.usedUp.message: Your credits are used up, please purchase more to continue

message.generating.description: Message displayed while the image is being generated

message.downloadVideo.description: Message displayed when the image is being generated

message.extendVideo.description: Message displayed when the image is being generated

message.generateFailed.description: Message displayed when image generation fails

message.uploadVideoExceed.message: The number of uploaded first-frame images exceeds the limit
message.uploadVideoExceed.description: Error message when the number of uploaded first-frame images exceeds the limit

message.uploadVideoSizeExceed.message: The uploaded file size cannot exceed 10MB!
message.uploadVideoSizeExceed.description: Error message when the uploaded file size exceeds 10MB

message.uploadVideoTypeFailed.message: The uploaded file must be in MP4 format!
message.uploadVideoTypeFailed.description: Error message when the uploaded file is not in MP4 format

message.uploadStartImageExceed.message: The number of uploaded first-frame images exceeds the limit
message.uploadStartImageExceed.description: Error message when the number of uploaded first-frame images exceeds the limit

message.uploadEndImageExceed.message: The number of uploaded last-frame images exceeds the limit
message.uploadEndImageExceed.description: Error message when the number of uploaded last-frame images exceeds the limit

message.uploadStartImageError.description: Error message when uploading the first-frame image fails

message.uploadVideoError.description: Error message when uploading the video fails

message.uploadEndImageError.description: Error message when uploading the last-frame image fails

message.uploadDocumentsError.description: Error message when uploading the document fails

message.noOperations.description: Message displayed when there are no available operations

message.noTasks.message: No historical tasks, please click on the left to generate a video
message.noTasks.description: Message displayed when there are no tasks
